column6: Note
nothing happens when trying to open BP after update
added a left ha to an order when the patient only ordered the right. Helped her to fix the order.
receiving error when starting bp. Reinstalled 64bit version
Wanting info on user access reports (concern over downloading a patient list). Gave him the scoop from here and he will reach back out if he wants to go forward.

wasn't able to launch bp after update but it worked while we were on the phone. Then she mentioned that editing appointments and saving  the changes doesn't automatically refresh and all other appointments disappear. so weird. I got a recording of that happening, but I can't replicate it.
Wanted help adding their signature, but didn't have access to user admin. Shared the user guide with her and told her to reach out to owner/admin.
calling for Taha
Didn't have admin access to install a program. Was on hold while they waited for a password. Told them to call back when they had one and hung up.

was getting a 'couldn't update' message, but then he restarted bp and it updated successfully. He also had a question about running reports for referral sources and also on how to send journal entries and reports to said referral source (healthcare provider).

Wondering about the resolution on her monitor to edit appointments. Her only options were below the minimum requirements.

Had another question about deactivating an employee and whether notes would still appear. Told her that they wouldn't show up in the user list, and their calendar can be deactivated, but notes should stay.

Calling back with admin credentials for the computer to get it installed. Hung up before it had been fully installed. So I watched and hoped that the person on the other end was with it enough on a Monday morning to be able to install Visual C++ and finish the process.
Unable to connect to BP. Advised them to restart their router.
Assistance running the patient ar statement report.
unable to communicate with launch link. Internet is no bueno. She's checking with other clinic and will call back if still having problems.
Update bar constantly popping up. Asked her to try restarting her computer and call back if it continued.
Merging with NH_vhc, but didn't get the change in ownership form that was sent last week. Left a CB for Jenna to coordinate getting that form to them.
created patient, but couldn't find him when creating appointment. He mixed up the first and last name.
Generating a series of campaigns based on patient zip code.

Needed to delete a 3rd party payment, but couldn't find it in the 3rd party ledger. It wasn't showing up with <All>, but we were able to find it filtering by <Payment>. Seemed related to the 'Show more" JIRA.
needed help on how to filter data in Excel. I warned her that's not what we do but I showed her what I know about Excel and filtering data.
Had some questions about appointment reminder configuration, and wanted to follow up on a ticket to adjust the SMS templates.
Wanted help with filters for a marketing campaign for tested not sold. Showed her where to find the primary filter in the parameters list.
How to do an exchange with a paid ADP portion. Talked her through it, nothing special.
was running cash flow report and no data was coming out. She was running it for the wrong location.

Issue communicating with Launch Link. Had another instance still in OneDrive. Uninstalled everything, and reinstalled.

Ping for US servers timed out. Told him to try resetting his router and reach out to ISP, then call back if those fixes didn't resolve it.
was looking for the adp invoice. Told her its coming out soon
Looking to follow up with Jenna on an ownership transfer, the phone cut out and started beeping at me about a minute in to the call.

Called in because their boss said they were having performance issues, there were no issues, asked if I could reinstall anyway.  Antivirus blocked the install, needs to reach out to owner to bypass AV
Wanted to get some questions answered about a merge. Reached out to Jenna for a transfer, but she was already on the phone with someone else at the clinic. 😅
Ran into an error trying to install after update. Reinstalled.
Had 'show quickadds only' selected
Audios not syncing, restarting didn't help, reintegrated
[can't recall, sorry]
Was rushing through adding inventory and didn't see the oticon charger in the list

printer kept erroring out when trying to print a quote. She was choosing the 'Estimate' template, which then would cause the printer to crash. When printing the word template, it would work. She is going to start using the word template quote and also the word invoice template.
Wanted to know how to add an accessory/ALD to the list of selectable accessories/ALDs. Talked her through where to find it in Setup.
Help installing the java version of BP.
Just needed to clopen to update, they didn't shut the computer down over the weekend
Update window kept looping. Restarting didn't work. Reinstalling did. Had a hard time getting connected. Had to use GetScreen.
Adding an accessory to the ALD drop-down.
Looking to get started with QBO
Changing the "trialDate" merge field on a form to a blank text field.
Wondering about a change to a WSIB form, going to confer with colleagues before moving forward
Scheduled OBC - a bunch of skips that are definitely on the clinic to comb through. See ticket for details.
Needed help fixing an order that had been partially receieved and not yet invoiced.
Needed help adding 3p allocation to an invoice
trialDate merge field not behaving how she wanted it to, and I'm not sure what it's pulling in either. Creating ticket to do some digging.
Wanted help doing a MM campaign to find out how many patients they have in each zipcode.  Helped her download a full patient list in excel and sent her a resource on how to count ocurrences.
Location not changing on invoice

Initially called because she didn't know how to run the sync at all (new, training). Remoted in because we weren't on the same page - talked her through hitting start, next, start, so on. There did end up being some skips - gave her a general run down of how to click to see error details and tips for resolving. The skips we looked at were related to a closing date. Recommended she reach out to whoever is in charge of accounting for their guidance.
Update loop. Restarting fixed it.
How to find people who purchased HAs in the last month by each brand.
Wonder how to tell if they've received a payment from insurance
Wondering if we had video tutorials on BP!
Still not totally understanding that they just need to add a 3p payment, I explained it as carefully as I could

Had created a ticket for scanning issues.  He said he thought it was fixed but now is apparently not working.  He does not have  a scanner installed currently.  I advised him to connect to a scanner, get that installed and updated and test to see if scanning works in and out of BP.
Help setting up users, new location scheduling, install BP on new machine and had questions on billing for their new locations
Wasn't clear on how to receive a 3p payment without having an invoice to apply it to, showed them receive 3p payment, again...
had a few outstanding payments they needed help finding and applying to balance out their books
BPLink was not running

wants to know of a way to make sure that patients who have multiple appointments, back to back, not get AR's for all of them. Just the first one. Also wants to prevent this from happening without having to recreate or duplicate existing event types
Initiated a carecredit payment outside of Bluprint, showed them the payment method swap workaround
is manually transferring appointment details from an excel sheet to BP and doesn't know how to create appointments. Impromptu training session on how to create appointments and create full clients
Needed to take a payment for an open sale on a card without pushing to a card terminal. Had her take a cash payment and changed the type.
Question on how to filter by insurer
Tymp data not transferring from Noah but we were unable to get connected to the Audiologist computer. Clinic will CB when they have access.
Wanted help reallocating 3rd party payments. Got connected and helped them sort through it.
Calling for Chris H.  Took a callback #
Request to disable reminders. Created ticket
Selling one of their locations, new owner is going to continue with BP, call went silent before we got any further, advised to call back and as for me
Calling to start the scheduling process for Noah int
Getting an error when submitting a HCFA, they didn't have a name on the pts insurance policy
Noah support- how to edit users, passwords, upgrade instructions.

Scanner software no longer working. Had to get connected using GetScreen. Very rude, did not seem interested in letting me troubleshoot, but rather talking over me and complaining about how long everything was taking. Got disconnected after being put on hold for the 4th time. Will cb.
Assuming she's calling back for the issue above. Put me on hold. Waited about two minutes while humming the star spangled banner in a minor key, then hung up.
Questions about changing fields in a HCFA
reminder of how to save draft and generate quote
Calling to see how late the phones will be open today, going to call back in 20 minutes or so
How to delete an order.

Continuing from previous call(s) about freezing and document scanning.

Very weird NOAH stuff going on, they are going to call back in a minute

Robot voice
Didn't enter

needed help printing labels for a campaign they are mailing out.
Needed to apply remaining 3rd party payment balance. Helped her find it in the ledger and apply it.
Couldn't launch Blueprint, having trouble connecting to other websites, seems like an ISP issue. After ~3min on the call  I couldn't hear her anymore and hung up.

Has us install for a new computer on 1/26 > It was throwing the no main class/JVM errors on 1/27 > It is throwing the same errors today. The install at the time of me looking at it was under documents. I opted to open a ticket after getting it up and running to better document the issue in case it happens again.
Kristy's email on file also isn't up to date - advised an owner will need to update.
Replacing the {{nextAppointmentDate}} merge field.
failed to load jvm
Could not print outside of Blueprint. Printer Error. Advised to reach out to IT/office manager
Yellow text in SMS messages. Unfamiliar with the 'notes' feature (as was I! Thanks Linden!)

Installing BP on two devices.

Question about the Patient AR Statement: they have a custom form, and it wasn't pulling all patient details as they were expecting. They were okay pulling the report with 3rd party details, and specifically didn't want the form to change (even though it wasn't working how they wanted it). Reached out to Alex for more details on the form.
trying to reach Knightsbridge Foreign Exchange Toronto
Questions about how to get the users to appear as provider options in audiology.

update window kept popping up. Just needed a close/reopen. Then she said she had printer issues. Reinstalled 64 bit. Partially resolved. Can print if a document is open, but right-clicking > print causes an error message. Will require additional investigation
Was getting 50138 edrror when opening Noah. Just needed to restart BPLink in services.
Wanted to know if he could change the model for an aid in a patient's file. Showed him how to edit the aid model details after delivery.
Help creating a ticket to request a copy of user activity in the last month.
Needed a walkthrough of how OAB is used and set up
Apply payment from EoB to claim, shows that it's closed. Helped her find the claim in 3rd party payer to apply it.
reinstalled 64 bit to resolve
how to print payment receipt
Questions about disclaimers on accounting templates. Helped her duplicate the template and update defaults.
requested password reset. advised he would need to reach out to owner/admin (Kelly)
How to deactivate and/or merge patient

Calling for Jenna
New client already in the system, needed to merge files. Walked him through the process.

Needed help adjusting 3rd party allocation on invoice. Helped her find the place to edit the invoice and make changes.
Calling for Logan. Took a callback number
Unable to edit an event type. Had online booking enabled checked even though online booking was disabled for the clinic.
BP and Noah not talking. Can't access server computer right now, so they'll call back.

Scheduled OBC for ticket 265748. See details there.
She added a report on the end about a couple of auto recalls that were recently edited - they're disappearing after adding notes. Bad bad not good, reopened that ticket (264955)
Heidi health is not generating the transcripts.
Looking for Bridget in relation to ticket. Told her I'd ping Bridget and ask that she reach out when she can.
Help getting BP installed.
Upgrading a client device to 4.14 in order to connect to the server.
Called back from yesterday to finish installation. Just needed the launch link. Once the installation began, told her once it finished it would launch automatically.

Said there were transactions missing from QB.
- First patient had nothing missing in QB.
- Second patient wasn't related to QB - it was a missing card payment. She didn't have the privilege to backdate the payment, so I sent the cash workaround instructions via ticket.

Mobile hearing clinic, clinician is unable to run Blueprint today. Unclear whether they have an internet connection. Told them to have the affected party reach out if they could, and that most likely it was an internet issue (unable to launch the application).
Help with a 3rd party return application
REquest for merge fields for ADP forms
Edit invoice, change allocation, receive/apply payment
questions about document storage costs, how to see storage usage, best practices to scanning/archiving

Needed to edit an invoice to apply a discount and a refund.

Also had a followup question about an old ticket, and ultimately decided the change originally requested in the ticket wasn't desired.
The flashing envelope 4.8.1.3 bug. Explained these icons are related to appt reminders (clinic doesn't have them) but nothing is actually being sent, it's just the UI doing something funny.
Enabling the "display invoice" option.
delete refund, use credit in 3p bulk payment

Adding BP to a new computer.
Was able to help resolve several skips for them. 7 left escalated to L2 and transferred to Chris
Wants default warranties set on the backend. Creating ticket for L2.

Got super confused about the "myhearingportal .com" at the beginning of the OAB URL, was trying to use just that to make a QR code. Talked him through how to get the full URL from Setup and that he can paste it into a web browser if he'd like to see the tool.
Wanted Blueprint installed on a new computer. Got connected to help walk through it.
Wondering about how to activate interactive sms/a reminders
couldn't scan multiple pages sent through feeder. We tested using a different setup, the TWAIN source, and it worked.
Error loading online form. The template was using Adobe signature fields- I helped replace these with text eSignatures which resolved the issue
Wants a list of HAs sold for the month to be able to reach out to manufacturers. Helped her run the HA Sale and Return Detail report.
Needed help fixing some 3p billing in two patients sales history
Scanning froze BP. Needed to change back to the 32-bit installer.
Had two transactions not syncing. Followed the instruction to change to singler user mode and then it worked
Called per ticket. "Open patient in Noah" option was greyed out. Reinstalled missing file (per slack thread) and the option was available upon restart of Blueprint.
Noah 50138. All troubleshooting steps exhausted. Escalated to L2
Wanted to setup a training session for next week. Creating a ticket.

Microsoft print to PDF was causing BP to crash. I showed her how to save the file as a PDF rather than use print to PDF. Also, since it was a report, I showed her the checkbox to generate the report as an external file saved as PDF. The issue will require further investigation
How to merge a patient that was duplicated
Wanted to find a report that included COGS. Recommended the Sales by Income Account.
General info on reminders. sent in FD

Thought his pw wasnt working but he apparently typed it in wrong
Wondering best way to move appt from one provider to another
User hung up 2 seconds into the call.

Calling regarding an issue where Noah is throwing an error message when tryin to save audiograms.  She stated that BP is sending patient data to Noah.  She did not have BP on the computer she was using and it is not the server computer so I could not test that connection.  She may reach out to Himsa and may call us back when we can get connected to the server computer.
needed help clearing out some outstanding balances they found in the a/r summary
meaning of yellow triangle next to invoice (open balance)
audiograms not exporting. when they try to manually export they get an error that the action failed. Admin shows the server is up.
Help installing BP on new computer
Wanted to know how to edit and upload word templates
As soon as I answered she said "ope, it's working now" and apologized and we ended the call
Questions on how to use HH mobile app. Sent info in a ticket

Scheduled OBC. QB was throwing an error about opening a different company file when it was the right path. Reinstalling BP worked. See ticket for better notes.
Also threw in a couple of enhancement reqs and asked about updating Noah Cloud. Offered to open a ticket for the Noah upgrade but he declined.
audiograms not transferring. restarting services resolved it
trying to get access to Noah, advised Anu (owner/admin) would need to approve. They will forward request to Anu
set online booking terms and conditions. showed her where to do this in setup
Needed help getting his computer reconected to Noah, also needed help installing BP on a computer
Wanted to know if there was any way to view the status of faxes sent out of Blueprint (:))
Needed help cleaning up some old test patient transactions
Reintalling Blueprint.

Started the call confused about the display monaraul/binaural button on prepare HCFA. She was saying she didn't know what Wellpoint would accept. I advised that I cannot confirm what the insurer will take. Then she said she couldn't generate the HCFA. Upon remoting in, her Mac display wasn't meeting the resolution requirement. Adjusted her system settings and that did the trick.
Wanted to know where to find and how to edit the Oticon Zeal templates. Showed her where to find them in Setup.
Appointment reminders not being sent to patients. All are showing a "delivery failed" symbol. Advised to reach out to the patient to confirm that the number the clinic has on file is accurate.
called to see where they were at with their request. Also had random questions about BP.
Wanted to know how to reach us about a possible software integration partnership.
Checkboxes on the Phonak Audeo & CROS Infinio Order form are checked by default and cannot be unchecked. Will create a ticket to let the clinic known once the form has been fixed.
Having issues connecting to blueprint. After much troubleshooting it appears that her internet connection speed is too slow to connect.

Wanted a list of patients who purchased aids 3+ years ago. Doesn't have any marketing privileges to run that. Advised I can't update privileges, but I can send a ticket with instructions to forward to the owner along with resources on how to run a marketing campaign. She declined.
wanted to confirm how to send out email campaign
help with filtering schedule, also showed daily schedule report
took cc payment intended for patient but on 3rd party. Needed help right away and didn't want to wait cause they needed to give a receipt today. So I told her to refund it and run it again.

lost bp from his desktop. Reinstalled 64bit version
Edit user scheduling/location, deactivate user. walked him through it

can't transfer audiograms. Reinstalled bplink
provisioning failed because of no privacy policy. I responded to the ticket to request the URL once again. Also had questions about how reminders work and how to set up an online forms tablet
Apparently a Phonak support rep deleted some files which resulted in the BP <-> Noah integration breaking...reintegrated quickly for him as he had a patient waiting which resolved the issue
Testing: successful
Overland Park clinic is having outbound fax issues

- New administrator so she's getting into the Setup menu for the first time.
- Initially asked about how to update the upcoming appt notification campaign email template to include some parking info. Talked her through how to get there and gave an elevator pitch on the template editor.
- Is billing based on users? No, confirmed it's by location.
- How to review role privileges. Also noted the UG page that explains each privilege.
- Also works with CA_lg. Has a personal laptop she was trying to install BP to and struggling. Remoted in to install both systems for her.
- Confirmed the iFrame for OAB is all she needs to give her web developer.
- Uses block scheduling. PTs who cancel their online appts take the block with them - is it possible to reinstate the unlinked block after cancellations? Confirmed no. (This is apparently a bug)

update sending email

Getting a Java error no matter how many times they attempted to reinstall. Installed the Java version.
Wants invoices to start from a specific number. She will be reaching out with details about when to start renumbering and from where in a ticket later.

Calling to check on ticket for skips.  Updated priority to med. Had another question on missing data, they seem to think that they are entering things like appt blocks that then don't show up.  They will log it next time it happens and then create a new ticket

got a message in QBO that her BP connection was going to be disconnected. She had not run the sync at all from when it was first set up. We ran it and it was going well (had over 200 transactions that needed to be synced). It looked like it froze half way through the sync. I told her to leave it and see what happens. She said she had to go get on another call but will call back if it is still stuck.

Terese called as she was getting an error message when trying to set up SMS messaging. She was unable to download the screenconect due to a network issue. She is looking into that and then will call back.

When events overlap and have the same resource type selected, one of them will have that resource type still selected when going to event details, while the other one does not have it selected when going into event details

Create manual campaign, set criteria
